notes:
Two quality issues from the v1.0.45 install: the Taskbar icon was pixelated at non-100% DPI scales, and the dashboard was still showing the pre-rebrand wordmark.

### Taskbar icon: full DPI-range ICO

v1.0.45's `icon.ico` was 592 bytes — single-resolution. Windows at 125% DPI picks 30px, at 150% DPI picks 36px, at 200% DPI picks 48px; with only a 32px frame in the ICO, Windows bilinear-scales 32 → 36 / 48 and the result is visibly blurred.

Rebuilt from the Copilot ASA source artwork with frames at **16, 20, 24, 30, 32, 36, 40, 48, 64, 96, 128, 256** so every common DPI scale gets an exact-pixel match. The S glyph is isolated from the source via green-channel dominance (preserves the dark fold panels), multi-step Lanczos to each target size, gentle unsharp mask on the smallest frames (≤32px) to recover perceived sharpness without halos.

`tray-app/src-tauri/icons/icon.ico` is now 64KB with all 12 frames; the `32/64/128/128@2x/icon.png` PNGs were re-exported from the same source for consistency with what Tauri bundles into the installer's resource section.

### Dashboard logo: update wordmark-tight-on-dark/light

The dashboard reads `static/branding/wordmark-tight-on-dark.png` (and its `-light` sibling) for the sidebar wordmark, but earlier sessions had only updated `tray-app/src/assets/wordmark-master-transparent.png` (which is the splash screen). The dashboard kept showing the pre-rebrand design.

Both `static/branding/wordmark-tight-on-{dark,light}.png` regenerated from the Copilot source at full native resolution (CSS constrains to 96px wide; serving at native ~430px keeps it crisp at any DPI). Background removal preserves the green fold panels via a green-dominance test (G > R+5 and G > B+5 always kept; otherwise max(R,G,B) < 40 → α 0). Light variant tints all non-green visible pixels to charcoal #2D2D2D so the metallic 3rd A reads cleanly on white.

Splash-screen asset (`tray-app/src/assets/wordmark-master-transparent.png`) updated with the same dark variant for consistency.

### Files touched

- `tray-app/src-tauri/icons/{32x32,64x64,128x128,128x128@2x,icon}.png`, `tray-app/src-tauri/icons/icon.ico` — regenerated multi-DPI
- `static/branding/wordmark-tight-on-dark.png`, `static/branding/wordmark-tight-on-light.png` — dashboard wordmark from Copilot source
- `tray-app/src/assets/wordmark-master-transparent.png` — splash-screen consistency

### Auto-updater note

Same pipeline as v1.0.45. Signing via the manual cmd.exe branch (env-var auto-sign was dropped after v1.0.45). Manifest mirror-pushed to `cjml34483/ASA-releases` (canonical) and `cjml34483/TradeSpace-releases` (legacy stub).
